notifications.title: Benefits Adjudication Notification Templates
notifications.description: Notification templates for a federal benefits adjudication workflow. Covers adverse decision notices (with due process requirements), hold notifications, appeal acknowledgments, and SLA warnings.

adverseBenefitsDecision.description: Notice of adverse benefits determination sent to applicant via postal mail and portal
adverseBenefitsDecision.subject: Notice of Decision: {{programName}} Application - Case {{caseId}}

sections.title: Official Notice
sections.content:
Dear {{applicantName}},

This letter is to inform you of the decision regarding your application for {{programName}} benefits.

sections.title: Decision
sections.content: After reviewing your application and supporting documentation, your request for {{programName}} benefits has been {{determination}}.

sections.title: Reason(s) for This Decision
Your Right to Appeal
sections.content:
You have the right to appeal this decision. To file an appeal, you must submit a written request to the {{appealBody}} within {{appealWindow}} of the date of this notice. The deadline to file your appeal is {{appealDeadline}}.

Your appeal will be reviewed by an adjudicator who was not involved in the original decision.

sections.title: How to File an Appeal
Continuation of Benefits During Appeal
sections.content: If you file your appeal before the effective date of this decision, your current benefits will continue at the existing level during the appeal process. If the appeal decision upholds the original determination, you may be required to repay benefits received during the appeal period.

sections.title: Questions?

holdPendingDocuments.description: Notice sent when case is placed on hold pending applicant document submission
holdPendingDocuments.subject: Action Required: Additional Documents Needed - Case {{caseId}}

sections.title: Notice of Hold
sections.content:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Your {{programName}} application (Case {{caseId}}) has been placed on hold because additional documentation is needed to process your application.

sections.title: What We Need
sections.content:
Reason for hold: {{holdReason}}

Please provide the following: {{requiredAction}}

sections.title: Response Deadline
sections.content: You must submit the requested documents within {{expectedDuration}} of the date of this notice. If we do not receive the required documents by the deadline, your case will be escalated for administrative review.

sections.title: Need Help?

appealAcknowledgment.description: Acknowledgment sent when an appeal is received
appealAcknowledgment.subject: Appeal Received - Case {{caseId}}

sections.title: Appeal Acknowledgment
sections.content:
Dear {{applicantName}},

We have received your appeal regarding the {{programName}} decision for Case {{caseId}}.

sections.title: What Happens Next
sections.content: Your appeal will be reviewed by an independent adjudicator within {{reviewTimeline}}. You will receive a written decision at the conclusion of the review.

sections.title: Benefits During Appeal
sections.content: Your current benefits will continue at the existing level while your appeal is under review.

slaDeadlineWarning.description: Internal warning sent to caseworkers when a task SLA is approaching its deadline
slaDeadlineWarning.subject: SLA Warning: {{taskName}} approaching deadline - Case {{caseId}}

sections.title: SLA Deadline Warning
